scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.install:render: npm --prefix backend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.build:render: npm run install:render && npm --prefix backend run playwright:install && npm run build
scripts.build:netlify: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
